name: cross-loop integration honors profile opt-in flags and does not emit when opt-in is unset
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'pr_corpus_cross_loop:\n  enabled: false\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/cross-loop/emit.sh" --profile profiles/p.yaml --target rubric --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'opt_in=false' out.txt && grep -q 'no_emission' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
